summary: Matchly Pro: 20-21 Nisan Elite bülteni yayında! Tüm VIP skorlar ve analizler güncellendi. 🚀🎯

matches.analysis: Both teams are prolific scorers in Asian competition. Vissel Kobe strong at home, Al Ahli dangerous on the break.
Real Madrid U19 have been dominant. Brugge competitive but the Spanish side's quality should have been enough.
Lechia Gdansk were solid but couldn't break down Piast's defense.
Tight Swedish second-tier match that surprisingly went in favor of Osters.
Midtjylland strong in the championship group. Quality prevailed in this title race clash.
Union Carl Berner runaway leaders in this division. Clear away win achieved.
Both teams prioritized defensive solidity as predicted. Minimal goalmouth action.
A shocking upset in the Hungarian second tier. Vasas dominance was broken.
Den Bosch failed to contain Jong Utrecht's youthful counter-attacks.
Controlled home win achieved at Riazor. Promotion push continues.
Fiorentina couldn't find the net against a stubborn Lecce defense.
Low-scoring affair as expected but ended in a draw.
A defensive London derby where Palace failed to find the net.
Tight low-scoring home win achieved as Moreirense's form held.
Narrow home win achieved. Boston River solid at home.
Platense couldn't secure the win. Cordoba held them to a draw.
Independiente Mendoza grabbed a surprising away win against Banfield.
Seoul strong at home in K-League. Bucheon struggling with defensive issues away.
Both teams score consistently. Open game with goals expected.
Jeonbuk dominant force at home. Comfortable home win expected.
Beijing Guoan in excellent form. Away win with goals likely.
Chengdu in devastating form. Heavy home win expected.
Home advantage crucial in this Austrian relegation battle.
CSKA Moscow solid at home. Low-scoring controlled home win expected.
Hajduk Split dominant at Poljud. Croatian league leaders should cruise.
Tight low-scoring home win expected at Son Moix.
Athletic Bilbao formidable at San Mames. Basque side to win.
Standard and Antwerp both score regularly. Open competitive match expected.
Genk strong at home. High-scoring home win likely.
Both teams to score looks the safest bet here.
Saints promotion push continues with comfortable home victory.
Foxes quality should shine through at the King Power.
Both teams involved in high-scoring matches. Goals expected.
Tight match with goals at both ends. Barnsley pushing for playoffs.
Both teams in good scoring form. Chelsea slight favorites.
Inter Milan dominant force at San Siro. Comfortable victory expected.
Lens defensive solidity key in this cup tie.
Cruz Azul in strong form (4th place, 29 pts) while Queretaro struggling near bottom (16 pts). The Machine should take all three points on the road.
Cartagines solid at home in Costa Rican league. San Carlos poor away form with defensive vulnerabilities. Low-scoring home win expected.

Monterrey (14th, 15 pts) coming off 1-3 loss to Pachuca but still heavy favorites at Estadio BBVA. Puebla (16th, 13 pts) destroyed 0-5 by Guadalajara last match, 6 games without a win. Both teams already eliminated from Liguilla.
America (6th, 22 pts) in better form than Leon (8th, 22 pts). The Eagles have more quality and should edge this Mexican league clash.
Indonesian league open and high-scoring. Both teams in decent form. Expect goals at both ends in this morning clash.
REAL FORM: Seoul are TOP of K-League 1 with 22 pts (7W 1D 1L). They just beat Bucheon 3-0 on April 21st. Bucheon in 6th with 10 pts (2W 4D 3L). Seoul dominant force at Sangam Stadium.
Pohang strong at home in K-League. Gwangju struggling away with recent losses. Steelers' solid defense should keep a clean sheet.
Daejeon solid at home, just beat Seoul 1-0 away on April 18. Jeju struggling away form. Home advantage should prove decisive in Korean league.
Both teams involved in open matches recently. Chinese Super League high-scoring. Expect goals at both ends in this afternoon fixture.
Shanghai SIPG dominant force in Chinese Super League, winning 5 straight. Qingdao Jonoon struggling near the bottom. Heavy home win almost certain.
REAL FORM: Zenit are TOP of Russian Premier League with 55 pts (16W 7D 2L). Lokomotiv 3rd with 48 pts. Zenit won their last 5 matches. Clear league leaders and favorites for this away clash.

REAL FORM: Both teams level on 35 pts (9W 8D 8L). Dinamo Moscow unbeaten in last 3 at VTB Arena. Rubin Kazan missing key players: Daku (suspension), Iwu, Jukic, Shvets (injuries). Home advantage decisive.

REAL FORM: PSG unbeaten in 19 of last 20 home matches vs Nantes. Over 2.5 goals in 8 of PSG's last 9 Ligue 1 games. Nantes drew last 3 matches but PSG's 35 goals in 21 games is league-best. Total mismatch at Parc des Princes.
Atletico Madrid in excellent form, winning 4 of last 5. Elche struggling near the relegation zone. Simeone's defensive organization should shut out the home side.
Bosnian title race clash. Zrinjski strong at home but Banja Luka competitive away. Tight match with both teams finding the net.
Union SG dominant in Belgian championship playoffs, winning 5 straight. Gent competitive but Union's home form overwhelming. Solid home win expected.
Club Brugge in devastating form at Jan Breydel, 5 straight wins. Mechelen struggling away in playoffs. Heavy home win the most likely outcome.
Ipswich Town pushing for automatic promotion, strong away form. Charlton mid-table with little to play for. Tractor Boys should take the points.
Birmingham solid at home in Championship. Preston inconsistent away with scoring issues. Low-scoring home win looks the safest bet.
REAL FORM: DFB Pokal SEMI-FINAL! Bayern won last 5 matches. Leverkusen lost 2-1 to Augsburg last match. Bayern 1.32 favorites. Musiala back from injury. Pokal classic between two Bundesliga giants.
Cardiff City heavy favorites against struggling Port Vale. Bluebirds pushing for promotion. Comfortable home win expected at Cardiff City Stadium.
French Cup semi-final clash. Strasbourg solid at home, Nice dangerous away. Competitive match with goals at both ends.
Coppa Italia semi-final! Atalanta in devastating form at Gewiss, 5 straight wins. Lazio competitive but Gasperini's attack overwhelming. Expect a thrilling cup tie in Bergamo.
Bournemouth strong at Vitality Stadium. Leeds inconsistent away in Premier League. Cherries' attacking quality should see them through.
Portuguese Cup semi-final, O Classico! Porto won last 5 at home. Sporting also in excellent form. Both teams score consistently. Tense cup derby with goals guaranteed at Estadio do Dragao.
Both teams are attack‑minded and matches between them regularly produce goals. AL Wahda's away form suggests they will contribute to an open game.
Both sides leak goals but carry a threat going forward. Over 2.5 is a solid value pick with two inconsistent defences.
Esperance are a dominant force at home and face a Zarzis side in dreadful form. A comfortable home win with a clean sheet is expected.
A typical relegation group clash where both teams prioritise not losing. Tight, physical game with few chances expected.
Both teams need points in the promotion race and recent meetings have been lively. The odds underestimate the chance of a high‑scoring affair.
Extremely low total goals expectation. Both teams are among the lowest scorers in the league and will be cautious in a relegation battle.
Liepaja are far superior and in strong away form. Super Nova are struggling but often score at home, so an away win with goals is likely.
Cup ties between these two often deliver goals. Trabzonspor's aggressive style leaves space, and Samsunspor are capable in attack.
Randers are strong at home in the relegation group and Fredericia are vulnerable away. The over 2.5 market is heavily backed.
Two attacking teams in the championship group. Previous meetings have been goal‑filled, and the odds accurately price a high‑scoring contest.
Spartak Moskova and Krasnodar are both well‑matched attacking sides. The odds suggest goals, and the head‑to‑head supports over 2.5.
Akhmat are defensively solid at home, while Baltika struggle to score away. A low‑scoring affair is highly probable.
AZ Alkmaar's games are rarely dull. Eagles are competitive at home and will push for goals. The low odds for over 2.5 reflect the market sentiment.
Levante are fighting to avoid relegation and are strong at home. Sevilla have been inconsistent on the road, giving value to the home side.
Early‑season Allsvenskan often sees cagey away performances from AIK. Degerfors lack cutting edge up front, making under 2.5 the smart play.
Malmö are the league's top scorers at home, and Sirius often concede but can grab a goal. The match is set up for over 2.5.
Beşiktaş are in fine form and the Turkish Cup produces goals. Alanyaspor can be dangerous on the counter, but the home side should dominate and secure a high‑scoring win.
Braga are a class above and Casa Pia are in poor shape. The visitors should claim a straightforward victory, likely with a clean sheet.
A tight championship group encounter between two tactical sides. Both defensive records are strong, and history shows low‑scoring clashes.
Damac are strong at home and face an out‑of‑form Al Akhdood. The hosts should secure a win with a clean sheet, but the match may open up if they score early.

Defensores de Justicia host Boca Juniors in the Argentine Primera Division opening round fixture. Boca Juniors bring their big-game pedigree but historically struggle away against physical lower-mid-table sides in Argentina. Def. Justicia are hard to beat at home and have won 2 of their last 3. With Boca's attacking quality and the hosts' competitive home record, goals from both sides is the best value bet.

Deportivo Pasto host Independiente Santa Fe in the opening round of the Colombian Primera A. Pasto are historically strong at home in Pasto's high altitude, which makes life difficult for visiting teams. Santa Fe have struggled on the road this season with 2 losses and 1 draw in their last 3 away fixtures. The altitude advantage and Pasto's solid home record make them the pick.

Universidad Católica host CSD Macara in the Ecuador Pro League. Católica are one of Ecuador's top clubs and are comfortable at home — 3 wins from their last 4 home games. Macara have been poor away from home with 3 defeats in their last 4 road trips. Católica's home dominance in Ecuadorian football makes them a confident pick.

Kaiserslautern host Eintracht Braunschweig in the 2. Bundesliga at Fritz-Walter-Stadion. Kaiserslautern have 14 wins in 30 league games and are mid-table promotion chasers with 49 goals scored. Braunschweig sit lower with just 8 wins from 30 matches and a poor defensive record of 50 conceded. Lautern's home advantage and greater quality make them the clear favourites.

Fortuna Düsseldorf host Dynamo Dresden in the 2. Bundesliga. Düsseldorf are pushing for promotion and have strong home form. Dresden are struggling badly with 4 defeats in their last 5 away matches and sitting in relegation trouble. Düsseldorf's quality, home advantage, and Dresden's alarming away record all point to a home win.

AL Hazem host AL Riyadh in the Saudi Pro League. Both sides have shown a habit of scoring — each team has netted in their last 4 consecutive matches. With similar mid-table ambitions and attacking intent on both sides, this fixture has the hallmarks of an entertaining, goal-filled encounter in the Saudi top flight.

RB Leipzig host Union Berlin in the German Bundesliga at Red Bull Arena. Leipzig are in strong form — 4 wins in their last 5 — chasing a European spot. Union Berlin are in the bottom half, having lost 3 of their last 5 including their last two away games. Leipzig's attacking depth, home support, and Union's poor road form make Leipzig clear favourites in this Bundesliga clash.

Napoli host relegation-threatened Cremonese at the Diego Armando Maradona in a crucial Serie A Round 34 fixture. Napoli sit 3rd and need points for their Champions League spot. Cremonese have managed just 1 win in their last 14 matches and have not beaten Napoli in Serie A for 32 years. With De Bruyne, McTominay and Hojlund available, Napoli should control this comfortably. Key absences: Lukaku (muscle), Di Lorenzo (knee) for Napoli; Vardy (muscle), Thorsby for Cremonese.

Shelbourne host Drogheda United at Tolka Park in the League of Ireland Premier Division. Shelbourne won the last H2H meeting 2-1. Drogheda are in poor form — no wins in their last 5 and just 2 wins from 11 league games this season. Both sides have suffered consecutive defeats recently, but Shelbourne's home advantage and superior H2H record give them the edge in this derby encounter.

St. Patricks Athletic host Bohemians in one of the best Dublin derbies in Irish football. St. Pat's have been in decent form — 3 wins in their last 5 — and have beaten Drogheda United 3-1 in their most recent match. Bohemians have struggled on the road, losing their last 2 away games. Richmond Park's atmosphere and St. Pat's home record should see the hosts take the three points.

Waterford host Galway United at RSC in a balanced League of Ireland Premier Division clash. Both sides have shown attacking intent this season and the fixture has historically produced goals. With both teams in similar mid-table positions and inconsistent form, a goals-heavy encounter with both sides finding the net is the most attractive betting angle.

Istanbul Basaksehir host Kasimpasa in a Turkish Super Lig mid-table clash. Basaksehir have dominated this fixture historically — 4 wins in their last 5 H2H meetings with no losses. Both teams have lost just once in their last 5 games. In 4 of their last 5 encounters, both sides have found the net. Basaksehir's home advantage and superior H2H record make them the pick here.

Monza host Modena in the Italian Serie B with promotion ambitions. Monza have been one of the more consistent sides in Serie B and are strong at home. Modena are winless in their last 4 and sit in serious danger of relegation. The class difference and home advantage should deliver a comfortable win for Monza in this second division clash.

Lyngby BK host Esbjerg in the Danish 1. Liga promotion group. Lyngby are pushing hard for promotion — 3 wins in their last 4 home matches — with a settled squad and promotion ambitions. Esbjerg have been in terrible form with 4 defeats in their last 5. This promotion group clash at home should deliver a Lyngby win as they look to seal their top-flight return.

Ljungskile host Helsingborg in the Swedish Superettan. Helsingborg are one of the division's most experienced clubs and come into this game with 3 wins in their last 4 including an away win. Ljungskile have been inconsistent — 2 defeats in their last 3 home games. Helsingborg's quality and current momentum give them the edge away from home.

Lens travel to Brest in a pivotal Ligue 1 title race clash. Lens are 2nd, just 1 point behind PSG, and are flying — 4 wins in last 5 including a stunning 4-1 Coupe de France semi-final win over Toulouse. Brest are winless in 4 straight league games but have scored in each of their last 4 home matches. Lens have won the last 4 H2Hs and scored in 11 consecutive away games. Both teams to score is the standout value bet in this wide-open fixture.

Annecy host Pau in France's Ligue 2. Annecy are in decent mid-table form with 3 wins in their last 5 home games and pushing for a top-10 finish. Pau have been struggling badly — 4 defeats in their last 5 matches — and have the worst away record in the division's bottom half. Annecy's home strength and Pau's dreadful road form point clearly to a home win.

Relegated Montpellier are using Ligue 2 as a springboard back to the top flight. They have been outstanding all season — 3 wins in their last 4 — and sit near the top of Ligue 2. Amiens are a mid-table side at home and have been inconsistent. Montpellier's quality, ambition and consistent away scoring record make them strong favourites here.

Red Star host Guingamp in a competitive Ligue 2 mid-table clash. Both teams have been scoring regularly this season and the H2H history shows goals from both sides in recent meetings. Red Star's home form has been solid with 3 wins in their last 4, while Guingamp are an attack-minded side who always provide entertainment. Both Teams to Score is the standout value pick.

Clermont host SC Bastia in the French second division. Clermont have been one of the better home sides in Ligue 2 with 3 wins in their last 4 home matches and a settled squad. Bastia have struggled on the road — 2 losses in their last 3 away games — and the travelling support adds to the atmospheric challenge. Clermont's home advantage is the key differentiator here.

Preussen Münster are bottom of the table with 0 wins in their last 5, scoring just 2 goals and conceding 13. Bielefeld have been inconsistent but carry more quality and should edge this relegation battle.
Karlsruhe have scored 12 goals in their last 5 matches, while Hannover are unbeaten in five with 2 wins and 3 draws. Both sides find the net regularly and the over 2.5 market is heavily favoured.
Hertha have won 4 of their last 5, picking up 13 points from 15 and mounting a late promotion charge. Holstein Kiel have 3 wins in 5 but Hertha's home momentum should prove decisive.
Fulham are unbeaten in 5 league matches and have conceded just 1 goal in that run. Aston Villa sit 4th and have won 5 of the last 6 head-to-head meetings. A tight but open contest is expected.
Rostov have lost 3 of their last 5 but face an Orenburg side also struggling for form. Rostov's home advantage in the Russian Premier League should be enough to secure a narrow win.
Eyüpspor had four straight defeats before a recent away win. Gaziantep's last five read win-loss-draw-loss-win, including a 4-1 success at Antalyaspor. Both defences are vulnerable.
Alaves have taken maximum points in 3 of their last 5 home meetings against Mallorca, who have won just 1 of their last 5 overall. A tight, low-scoring encounter favours the hosts.
Lyon have gone 5 matches without a win but face an Auxerre side that has also struggled for victories. Lyon's superior squad quality at home should break the stalemate.
Parma have drawn 3 of their last 5 and are tough to beat at home. Pisa travel with decent form. The odds suggest value on goals in what should be an evenly matched Serie A contest.
Augsburg are winless in 5, scoring just 6 and conceding 12. Eintracht Frankfurt have 2 wins in their last 5 and won the reverse fixture in December. The visitors are rightly favoured.
Köln have drawn four of their last five, playing attractive but leaky football. Leverkusen's attacking quality is undeniable and this Rhine derby rarely disappoints for goals.
Wolfsburg are unbeaten in 5, winning 3 of them, and are pushing for European places. M'gladbach have been inconsistent on the road, making the home side a solid pick.
Liverpool are in imperious form, unbeaten in 5 with four wins, conceding just 2 goals. Crystal Palace have been decent but Anfield is a fortress where the Reds normally dominate.
Wolves are in a tailspin, without a win in 5 and conceding heavily. Tottenham are flying high in the title race, unbeaten in 5 with 4 wins, and should have too much firepower.
West Ham have been inconsistent but are tough to break down at home. Everton have found some form with back-to-back wins. A cagey, low-scoring London Stadium affair is expected.
Fiorentina have won 3 of their last 5, showing strong form at home. Sassuolo are inconsistent with just 2 wins in 5, conceding regularly. Fiorentina's attacking quality should edge this.
Gençlerbirliği are winless in their last 5, conceding heavily. Kocaelispor have been slightly better but both defences are vulnerable, which should lead to an open game with goals.
Vallecano sit 13th and have won just 1 of their last 5. Real Sociedad are pushing for Europe in 8th, with 3 wins in 5 and a strong defensive record on the road.
Como 1907 are flying high in 5th place, scoring freely with 3 wins in their last 5. Genoa have been inconsistent in 13th and may struggle to contain Como's dynamic attack.
Both sides have been inconsistent but carry an attacking threat. Lorient need points at home while Strasbourg have been solid on the road, setting up an entertaining contest.
Stuttgart are 4th in the Bundesliga and pushing for Champions League football, with 3 wins in their last 5. Werder Bremen sit 15th and have lost 3 of 5, struggling on the road.
Chelsea are in complete crisis, losing their last 5 league matches without scoring. Leeds have shown fight in the Premier League and could take advantage of Chelsea's fragile confidence.
Real Oviedo are bottom of La Liga but have shown fight at home. Elche are 13th and inconsistent away. A tight, low-scoring relegation battle is expected with the hosts having a slight edge.
A clash between two European heavyweights. Arsenal have been strong at home while Lyon are dominant in France. Both teams score freely and this should be an open, high-quality encounter.
Rennes are in superb form with 3 straight wins, scoring 9 goals. Nantes are winless in 5, failing to score in most of those matches. A comfortable home victory is highly probable.
Paris FC have been inconsistent in 12th place while Lille are 5th and have won 3 of their last 5. Lille's superior quality and form should see them through.
Le Havre are winless in 5 but face a Metz side that is bottom of Ligue 1 with just 3 wins all season. Le Havre's home advantage should be enough in this relegation six-pointer.
Bayern Munich are top of the Bundesliga with a near-perfect record. Mainz have been inconsistent and will struggle to contain Bayern's attacking firepower at the Allianz Arena.
Torino have been solid at home but Inter are league leaders with a formidable attack. Inter have won 4 of their last 5 and the reverse fixture ended 5-0, highlighting the gulf in class.
Osasuna are 10th and unbeaten in 5, showing great resilience at home. Sevilla are in relegation trouble (18th) with 4 losses in their last 5 league matches. The form guide strongly favours the hosts.

The biggest derby in Turkish football. Galatasaray lead the league but Fenerbahçe are in relentless form and unbeaten in their last 5. Fenerbahçe's attacking firepower, led by Dorgeles Nene who has 5 goals in his last 5 appearances, could overwhelm the hosts in a stunning away victory.
Marseille are 4th and pushing for Champions League qualification. Nice are 15th and battling relegation. Marseille's home form has been strong and they should have too much quality.
A classic Serie A clash between two Italian giants. Both sides have been in decent form and matches between them are typically tight but high on quality. Goals are expected at both ends.
Villarreal are 4th in La Liga with 4 wins in their last 5, playing attacking football. Celta Vigo have been inconsistent and Villarreal's home form should prove decisive.

Alanyaspor are winless in 4 but have a solid home record against mid-table sides. Samsunspor have won their last 2 but three of the last five meetings between these sides have ended level. The odds narrowly favour a home win in what should be a tight contest.

Cagliari have lost 4 of their last 5 league matches, conceding 47 goals in 33 games this season. Atalanta sit 7th and are unbeaten in their last 5 with 2 wins and 3 draws. The visitors' superior quality should see them secure all three points.

Beşiktaş are unbeaten in their last 7 meetings with Karagümrük, winning 6 and drawing 1. Karagümrük are in poor form with just 1 win in their last 15 away games. The odds heavily back a comfortable home win with goals at Vodafone Park.

Trabzonspor are 3rd in the Super Lig and unbeaten in their last 5 matches with 4 wins and a draw. Konyaspor have only 2 wins in their last 5. Trabzonspor have been consistent on the road with 10 wins from 12 away games and should edge this contest.

Lazio have won 3 of their last 5 league matches and sit 9th in Serie A. Udinese are 11th with a mixed away record. The last meeting between these sides ended 1-1 and four of the last five head-to-heads have seen under 2.5 goals. The odds strongly point to a low-scoring affair.

Espanyol are winless in 2026, losing 4 of their last 5 league matches and sitting just 4 points above the relegation zone. Levante, despite being 19th, have won 3 of their last 4 matches including victories over Getafe and Sevilla. The visitors have momentum and could spring a surprise at RCDE Stadium.

Manchester United sit 3rd in the Premier League and are coming off a 1-0 win at Chelsea. Brentford have drawn their last 5 matches and are without a win since March. Eight of the last ten meetings between these sides have seen over 2.5 goals, and the odds heavily back another high-scoring encounter at Old Trafford.

Velez Sarsfield have kept clean sheets in their last 4 league matches and sit 3rd in the table with 8 wins from 15. Union Santa Fe have lost their last 4 league games away from home, conceding over 2.5 goals in each. The hosts' defensive solidity should prove decisive in what's likely to be a low-scoring affair.

Athletic Club MG sit 7th with 2 wins and 2 draws from 5 Serie B matches. Nautico are 14th and suffered a heavy 0-3 home defeat to Sao Bernardo last time out. Both sides have been inconsistent defensively, which should produce an open contest.

Defensor Sporting have been solid at home with a 2-0 win over Boston River and a clean sheet against Racing. CA Progreso are winless in 5 away matches and concede an average of 2.60 goals per game on the road. The hosts should secure a straightforward victory.

Huracan are unbeaten in 5 matches across all competitions, scoring 9 goals and conceding just 3. Argentinos Juniors have won 4 of their last 5, scoring 9 goals. Both teams come into this in excellent attacking form and the last five head-to-head encounters have seen both sides score in three of them.

SD Aucas are heavily favoured despite mixed recent form. Delfin have won just 1 of their last 5 matches and have scored only 2 goals in that period. The hosts' superior squad depth and home advantage should be enough, but goals may be scarce given both sides' recent struggles in front of net.

Roda finished 8th in the Eerste Divisie with 55 points while Waalwijk sit 6th with 58 points. Waalwijk have been consistently involved in high-scoring matches with their last 5 all seeing over 2.5 goals and scoring 11 goals. Roda have conceded 21 goals in their last 10 matches. Goals look guaranteed.

CD Feirense have won just 1 of their last 5 matches, scoring only 2 goals and conceding 6. Torreense have won 3 of their last 5, scoring 8 and conceding just 3. The visitors' superior form and defensive solidity should prove the difference in this Portuguese second-tier clash.

Norrköping have been in devastating form, winning 4 of their last 5 and scoring 12 goals. Landskrona have won just 1 of their last 5, conceding 10 goals in that period. The gulf in class is reflected in the odds, and a comfortable home victory with multiple goals is the most likely outcome.

Both sides are struggling in the Egyptian Premier League relegation round. Al Mokawloon have scored just 5 goals in their last 5 matches while Ghazl El Mahallah have managed only 5 goals in the same period. The odds heavily favor a low-scoring encounter, and for good reason.

A top-of-the-table Virsliga clash. Rigas Skola have started the season with 7 wins from 8 league matches and sit top. Riga FC are in excellent form themselves, winning 4 of their last 5 and scoring 21 goals. Both teams are prolific in attack, and the last head-to-head ended 4-3.

Peterborough have scored 11 goals in their last 5 matches despite winning just once. Mansfield have scored 9 goals in their last 5. Both teams have been involved in entertaining, high-scoring matches, and the over 2.5 odds are heavily favoured in this League One contest.

Southampton sit 5th and are unbeaten in their last 4 league matches as they push for promotion. Ipswich Town are 2nd with 3 wins in their last 5. Both sides are among the Championship's top scorers and this high-stakes encounter at St Mary's promises goals.

Scunthorpe have 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss in their last 5 but have conceded 12 goals in that span. Southend sit 7th in the National League and have won their last 4 away matches, scoring 6 at FC Halifax Town. The visitors' momentum could be decisive in this playoff clash.

A massive Champions League semi-final first leg at the Parc des Princes. PSG have won their last 5 matches in all competitions, scoring 12 goals in their last 4 Champions League games. Bayern are unbeaten in 19 matches and have won five of the last six meetings with PSG. Both teams are in devastating attacking form and this should be a classic European night with goals at both ends.

MC Alger have been in excellent form, winning 4 of their last 5 matches and going unbeaten in 5 league games. Olympique Akbou have been inconsistent with 2 wins in their last 5. The hosts' defensive record of just 3 goals conceded in 5 matches should see them through comfortably in this Algerian Ligue 1 encounter.

Lanus hold the historical advantage in this Libertadores tie, having won the last meeting 3-1 in August 2024. LDU Quito lost 1-0 to Emelec in their previous outing. Lanus are solid at home in continental competition and should edge a tight, low-scoring affair.

Botafogo lead Group E with maximum points and welcome Bolivian visitors Independiente Petrolero, who sit bottom of the group. Botafogo have scored at least 2 goals in each of their last 7 matches across all competitions. With over 2.5 goals landing in their last 6 Brasileirão matches and the visitors' poor defensive record, this should be a comfortable home victory at the Estádio Nilton Santos.

San Lorenzo are unbeaten in their last 8 matches across all competitions (4 wins, 4 draws) and lead Sudamericana Group D. Santos, even with Neymar, have been inconsistent. The hosts' momentum and home advantage at the Nuevo Gasómetro should prove decisive.

Charlotte FC have won 4 of their last 5 matches in all competitions, scoring 17 goals. Atlanta United have won just 1 of their last 5. The hosts' superior form and home advantage in this US Open Cup Round of 16 clash make them clear favourites.

Cruzeiro have won just 1 of their last 5 matches and are struggling for consistency. Boca Juniors have been in excellent form, winning 4 of their last 5 and scoring 9 goals while conceding just 2. The visitors' pedigree in this competition should see them through at the Mineirão.

Nashville SC have won 4 of their last 5 MLS matches, conceding just once in that stretch. Tigres have been solid but less dominant with 2 wins and 2 draws in their last 5. In this first leg of the semi-final, the MLS side's defensive discipline at Geodis Park could give them a narrow edge.

Tolima sit 3rd in Group B with 1 point and desperately need a home win to stay in contention. Coquimbo are 2nd with 4 points and in good form, but Tolima's high altitude home advantage in Ibagué and greater Libertadores experience should prove decisive in this crucial group encounter.

Sporting Cristal host Atlético Junior in a pivotal Group F clash at Matute. The Peruvian side will rely on their passionate home support, while Junior travel with confidence. The reverse fixture saw a tight contest, and another low-scoring affair is expected with the hosts having a slight edge.

O'Higgins come into this Sudamericana clash having won 2-0 at Ñublense in their last outing. Boston River suffered a heavy 4-1 defeat to Montevideo City. The Chilean side are strong at home in El Teniente and should control this contest against a visiting side struggling for defensive stability.

Tromso are top of the Eliteserien with 5 wins and 1 draw from 6 matches, scoring 11 and conceding just 1. Brann are 14th with only 1 win in 6, conceding heavily. The gulf in class is enormous and the hosts should cruise to a comfortable victory at Alfheim Stadion.

Wydad sit 3rd in Botola Pro with 31 points from 16 matches and have been hard to beat despite recent draws. US Yacoub Mansour are struggling near the bottom with poor away form. The hosts have far superior quality and should secure a narrow but comfortable victory at the Stade Mohamed V.

Mamelodi Sundowns sit 2nd with 58 points, just one behind Orlando Pirates with a game in hand. Despite two frustrating draws, they remain the strongest side in the PSL. Polokwane City are 6th and competitive, but Sundowns have won 6 of the last 9 meetings between these sides and should return to winning ways.

Chester have won both previous meetings this season 2-0. However, all four recent encounters between these sides have seen under 2.5 goals. Macclesfield are solid at home while Chester are unbeaten in 6 matches. A tight, tactical playoff clash is expected with few clear chances.

A heavyweight Champions League semi-final first leg at the Metropolitano. Atletico snapped a four-game losing streak with a 3-2 win over Athletic Club on Saturday, but remain vulnerable. Arsenal returned to the top of the Premier League with a 1-0 win over Newcastle and beat Atletico 4-0 in the league phase. First-leg caution typically prevails at this stage, with a low-scoring draw or narrow away win the most likely outcome.

MAS Fes have dominated this fixture historically, winning 8 of 17 meetings with just 3 defeats. Hassania Agadir have struggled for consistency on the road. Botola Pro matches are typically low-scoring, and the hosts' home advantage at the Complexe Sportif de Fes should be enough for a narrow victory.

Sporting CP sit 3rd on 72 points and have won all of their last 5 meetings against Tondela, who are 17th with just 21 points and fighting relegation. Despite Sporting's recent dip in form with just 1 win in 6, the visit of the league's second-worst defence offers the perfect opportunity to return to winning ways in style at the Estádio José Alvalade.

Aliağa Futbol finished 4th in the 2. Lig Kırmızı group with 69 points, while Muş SK sit 3rd with 70 points and are in excellent form with 4 wins in their last 5 matches, scoring 12 goals. Aliağa suffered a heavy 5-0 defeat to champions Bursaspor in their last outing but have been strong at home all season with 13 wins. Both promotion-chasing sides play attacking football and this first-leg playoff clash should produce goals.

Şanlıurfaspor finished 5th in the 2. Lig Beyaz group with 65 points and are in excellent form with 4 wins in their last 5 matches. Muğlaşpor sit 2nd with 72 points and have been one of the strongest sides in the division, winning 10 away games. Şanlıurfaspor held Muğlaşpor to a 0-0 draw in the regular season meeting and home advantage at the 11 Nisan Stadyumu could prove decisive in this playoff encounter.

Rayo Vallecano sit 13th in La Liga but have been impressive in Europe, scoring 20 goals across the competition. Strasbourg are 7th in Ligue 1 and are yet to lose in Europe this season over ten matches across knockout stages and the league phase, winning each of their last two Ligue 1 matches. Both teams score in 83% of their respective matches and this historic first-leg semi-final at Vallecas promises an open, entertaining contest.

Shakhtar Donetsk top the Ukrainian Premier League with 57 points from 24 matches and have won 3 of their last 5 in all competitions, keeping 3 clean sheets. Crystal Palace sit 13th in the Premier League with 43 points and have been inconsistent with 2 wins, 1 draw and 2 losses in their last 5. Shakhtar's European experience and home advantage at the NSK Olimpiyskyi give them a slight edge in this first-leg semi-final.

Braga are competing in just their second major European semi-final, 15 years after losing the Europa League final to Porto. They have kept a competition-high seven clean sheets and are unbeaten in four home games against German opposition (W3 D1), winning three of five European home games without conceding this term. Freiburg suffered a heavy 4-0 defeat to Borussia Dortmund last weekend and have won just two of their last nine Europa League away matches. Braga's home fortress at the Estádio Municipal gives them the edge.

An all-English Europa League semi-final first leg at the City Ground. Nottingham Forest are third in the Premier League form table over their past six games, scoring 15 goals including a 5-0 thrashing of Sunderland, and are unbeaten in eight matches. Aston Villa are on an 11-match winning streak in all competitions and are legitimate Premier League title challengers. The last meeting between these sides ended 1-1 on 12 April 2026. Both teams are in devastating attacking form and this historic clash promises goals at both ends.

Henan have lost four of their last five league matches, with only a goalless draw at Qingdao West Coast interrupting the run[reference:0]. Both sides sit at the wrong end of the table in this relegation six-pointer, but Henan's home advantage at Zhengzhou Hanghai Stadium gives them a slight edge in what should be a tense, low-scoring affair.

A mouth-watering clash between two newly promoted sides now sitting 3rd and 2nd in the CSL. Dalian won five straight before losing to Yunnan Yukun, while Chongqing remain unbeaten with 5 wins and 3 draws[reference:1]. Both teams play expansive attacking football and this top-of-the-table encounter promises goals at both ends.

A relegation six-pointer at the bottom of the CSL table. Tianjin sit 15th with just 8 points but showed signs of life with a 4-2 away win at Beijing Guoan last round[reference:2]. Wuhan are 14th and have lost 5 of 8 matches, conceding 16 goals. Tianjin's home crowd and recent momentum should tip this crucial survival battle in their favour.

Shandong Taishan started the season on minus-6 points but have worked their way to 7 points with 4 wins from 8 matches[reference:3]. Qingdao Youth Island sit 7th and have been solid defensively but lack firepower away from home. The most likely scoreline according to data models is 1-0 to Shandong, reflecting the hosts' superior quality[reference:4].

The standout fixture of the CSL weekend. Chengdu Rongcheng lead the league with 7 wins and 1 draw, scoring freely, while Shanghai Shenhua are unbeaten with 6 wins and 2 draws despite a 10-point deduction[reference:5]. Chengdu have dominated this fixture historically with 4 wins in 8 meetings, but Shenhua's 5-game winning streak makes this a genuine blockbuster between the division's two standout sides.

St Patrick's Athletic lead the Premier Division table with 8 wins from 13 matches and have won away at Drogheda, Waterford and Shelbourne already this season[reference:6]. Galway sit 6th with 15 points and have been inconsistent. The visitors' superior attacking firepower and title-chasing momentum should prove decisive at Eamonn Deacy Park.

Dundalk sit 3rd in the Premier Division and are in strong form, winning 3 of their last 5 including a 3-2 victory over Shelbourne in their most recent meeting and a 2-0 win over leaders St Patrick's[reference:7]. Shelbourne are 5th with 13 points and have struggled to match Dundalk's intensity. The hosts' attacking momentum at Oriel Park should secure another three points.

Both sides have already secured their Pro League survival thanks to Zulte Waregem's win at Dender[reference:8]. This takes the pressure off and should free both teams to play expansive football. Their last meeting ended 2-2 in April, and with nothing at stake, another entertaining, high-scoring encounter is expected at the Jan Breydel Stadium.

Pisa are bottom of Serie A with just 18 points and have lost 4 consecutive matches, scoring just once in that run[reference:9]. Lecce sit 17th with 29 points and have the worst attack in Serie A with 22 goals in 34 matches[reference:10]. This relegation battle features the league's two weakest attacks, making under 2.5 goals an overwhelmingly likely outcome.

Livingston are bottom of the Premiership with 19 points and are winless in their last 8 league meetings with Aberdeen[reference:11]. Aberdeen have won their last two matches and have kept a clean sheet in each of their last 3 visits to the Tony Macaroni Arena. The Dons need a result to secure their Premiership status and should deliver.

Shamrock Rovers sit 2nd in the Premier Division with 25 points, just 1 behind leaders St Patrick's. Waterford are bottom with just 5 points from 12 matches and have yet to win a league game this season[reference:12]. Rovers have dominated this fixture historically with 7 wins and 1 draw in the last 8 meetings. A comfortable home victory is expected at Tallaght Stadium.

Leeds United have reached the 40-point mark and need a win to further cement their Premier League survival[reference:13]. Burnley have already been relegated following a 1-0 defeat to Manchester City and have won just 1 of their last 25 Premier League games[reference:14]. The Clarets have also just sacked manager Scott Parker. Leeds should cruise to a comfortable victory at Elland Road.

Real Zaragoza are fighting for their Segunda Division survival and are more than obliged to win at La Romareda[reference:15]. Granada sit on 45 points and are virtually safe, but arrive in dreadful form having lost four of their last five matches[reference:16]. Zaragoza's desperation and home advantage should prove decisive against a Granada side with little to play for.

Girona sit 15th with 38 points and have lost two consecutive matches[reference:17]. Mallorca are the worst away team in La Liga and have never even picked up a point at Montilivi in the top flight[reference:18]. Girona have also won the last three head-to-head meetings including a 2-1 victory in January. Home advantage should extend that streak.

San Antonio Bulo Bulo enjoy the significant advantage of playing at altitude in Bolivia, where visiting sides traditionally struggle. Independiente Petrolero have been inconsistent on the road and face a daunting trip to one of the toughest venues in Bolivian football. The hosts should secure a narrow victory in challenging conditions.
